---
title: "R Notebook"
output: none

Author: Galen O'Shea-Stone
Date: 10/6/25
Title: HOX_dev_focus
---

```{r}
# ======================================================================
# HOX axis analyzer — DE-only core + 14 visualizations (white bg, A at top)
# Required: DE table with columns gene, padj, and log2FC or log2FoldChange
# Optional (for some plots): expression matrix, sample metadata, HOX coords
# ======================================================================

# ---------------------------
# CONFIG — set these paths
# ---------------------------
de_file         <- "DESeq2_Sacral_vs_Sacralized_Caudal_by_SYMBOL.csv"     # REQUIRED
out_dir         <- "hox_axis_outputs"

# OPTIONAL inputs (only used by plots 11, 12, 10)
expr_file       <- NULL  # e.g., "normalized_counts.csv" (rows=genes; first col 'gene'; rest=samples)
sample_meta     <- NULL  # e.g., "sample_metadata.csv" with columns: sample, group
meta_group_col  <- "group"  # which column in sample_meta defines groups/stages/regions
hox_coords_file <- NULL  # e.g., "hox_coords.csv" with columns: gene, start (genomic start position)

padj_cut <- 0.05

# Volcano label controls
volc_lfc_thr            <- 0.5        # vertical guide lines at ±this LFC
somite_label_top_n      <- 30         # label top-N somite genes by significance (set Inf for all)
somite_label_min_absLFC <- 0.25       # only label if |log2FC| ≥ this
somite_label_only_sig   <- FALSE      # TRUE = only label somite genes with padj < padj_cut

# ---------------------------
# Libraries
# ---------------------------
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr); library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(stringr)
  library(ggplot2); library(scales); library(ggrepel)
})

dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# ---------------------------
# Helpers
# ---------------------------
guess_reader <- function(path){
  first <- readr::read_lines(path, n_max = 1)
  if (grepl(",", first)) return(readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE))
  if (grepl("\t", first)) return(readr::read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE))
  readr::read_table(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
}
rename_if <- function(df, from, to){ i <- which(tolower(names(df))==tolower(from)); if(length(i)==1) names(df)[i] <- to; df }
hox_parse <- function(sym){
  m <- stringr::str_match(sym, "^HOX([ABCD])(\\d{1,2})$")
  if (is.na(m[1,1])) return(c(NA, NA))
  c(m[1,2], as.integer(m[1,3]))
}
save_plot <- function(p, stem, w=10, h=3){
  png_path <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(stem, ".png"))
  pdf_path <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(stem, ".pdf"))
  ggsave(png_path, p, width=w, height=h, dpi=300)
  ggsave(pdf_path, p, width=w, height=h, device = cairo_pdf)
}
theme_white <- theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank())
rev_y <- c("D","C","B","A")  # reverse to show A at the top

# ---------------------------
# Load DE table (REQUIRED)
# ---------------------------
de <- guess_reader(de_file)
names(de) <- gsub("\\s+","_",names(de))
if (!"gene" %in% tolower(names(de))) names(de)[1] <- "gene"
names(de)[tolower(names(de))=="gene"] <- "gene"
de <- de |>
  rename_if("log2foldchange","log2FoldChange") |>
  rename_if("log2fc_shrunken","log2FC_shrunken") |>
  rename_if("basemean","baseMean")
stopifnot("padj" %in% names(de))
if (!("log2FC" %in% names(de)) && !("log2FoldChange" %in% names(de)))
  stop("DE file must contain 'log2FC' or 'log2FoldChange'.")

val_col    <- if ("log2FoldChange" %in% names(de)) "log2FoldChange" else "log2FC"
shrink_col <- if ("log2FC_shrunken" %in% names(de)) "log2FC_shrunken" else val_col
has_baseMean <- "baseMean" %in% names(de)

de2 <- de |>
  mutate(
    gene = toupper(as.character(gene)),
    HOX_cluster = sapply(gene, function(g) hox_parse(g)[1]),
    HOX_PG      = as.integer(sapply(gene, function(g) hox_parse(g)[2])),
    is_HOX      = !is.na(HOX_cluster),
    log2FC_raw  = .data[[val_col]],
    log2FC_shr  = .data[[shrink_col]],
    expr_log2   = if (has_baseMean) log2(pmax(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(baseMean)), 0) + 1) else NA_real_,
    dir = case_when(.data[[val_col]] > 0 ~ "up",
                    .data[[val_col]] < 0 ~ "down",
                    TRUE ~ "flat"),
    sig = padj < padj_cut
  ) |>
  mutate(HOX_cluster = factor(HOX_cluster, levels = c("A","B","C","D")))

# Curated set
somite_set <- c("MEOX1","MEOX2","TCF15","MYF5","MYOD1","DLL3","TBX6","SNAI1","SNAI2",
                "DACT2","DVL1","FZD1","FGF8","FGF18","WNT3A","WNT5A","WNT11",
                "CYP26A1","ALDH1A2","GDF11","HOXA11","HOXD11","HOXC11","HOXA13","HOXD13",
                "ZIC1","NPAS4","TBX1","SOX6","SLIT3")

# ---------------------------
# Tables
# ---------------------------
present_tbl <- de2 |>
  mutate(call = case_when(sig & dir=="up"   ~ "↑ (padj<0.05)",
                          sig & dir=="down" ~ "↓ (padj<0.05)",
                          TRUE              ~ "ns")) |>
  dplyr::select(gene, HOX_cluster, HOX_PG, log2FC_raw, log2FC_shr,
                dplyr::any_of("baseMean"), expr_log2, padj, call)
readr::write_csv(present_tbl, file.path(out_dir,"gene_calls_with_HOX_annotations.csv"))

somite_tbl <- de2 |> filter(gene %in% somite_set) |> arrange(padj, desc(abs(log2FC_raw)))
readr::write_csv(somite_tbl, file.path(out_dir,"somitogenesis_focus_GRCg7b.csv"))

# ======================================================================
# PLOT 1 — HOX expression heatmap (sig-only; fill = log2(baseMean+1) if available)
# ======================================================================
if (!has_baseMean) {
  message("PLOT 1 skipped: 'baseMean' not found in DE; expression proxy unavailable.")
} else {
  dat <- de2 |> filter(is_HOX, sig)
  lims_expr <- quantile(dat$expr_log2, c(0.05,0.95), na.rm=TRUE)
  if (!all(is.finite(lims_expr)) || diff(lims_expr)==0) lims_expr <- range(dat$expr_log2, na.rm=TRUE)
  p1 <- ggplot(dat, aes(HOX_PG, HOX_cluster, fill = expr_log2)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:13) +
    scale_y_discrete(limits = rev_y, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", limits = lims_expr, oob = squish, na.value = "white") +
    coord_equal() +
    labs(title = "HOX — expression proxy log2(baseMean+1), significant only",
         x = "Paralog group (PG)", y = "Cluster (A at top)", fill = "log2(baseMean+1)") +
    theme_white
  save_plot(p1, "P01_HOX_expression_grid_SIGONLY")
}

# ======================================================================
# PLOT 2 — HOX log2FC grid (sig-only; diverging)
# ======================================================================
dat2 <- de2 |> filter(is_HOX, sig)
lfs <- dat2$log2FC_raw; if (length(na.omit(lfs)) < 3) lfs <- c(-1, 1)
L  <- max(1, as.numeric(quantile(abs(lfs), 0.9, na.rm = TRUE)))
lims_lfc <- c(-L, L)
p2 <- ggplot(dat2, aes(HOX_PG, HOX_cluster, fill = log2FC_raw)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:13) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev_y, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#CFE8FF", mid = "#FFFFFF", high = "#FFD6CC",
                       limits = lims_lfc, midpoint = 0, oob = squish) +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = "HOX — log2FC (raw), significant only",
       x = "Paralog group (PG)", y = "Cluster (A at top)", fill = "log2FC") +
  theme_white
save_plot(p2, "P02_HOX_log2FC_grid_SIGONLY")

# ======================================================================
# PLOT 3 — HOX direction grid (sig-only; up/down)
# ======================================================================
p3 <- ggplot(dat2, aes(HOX_PG, HOX_cluster, fill = ifelse(log2FC_raw < 0, "down","up"))) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:13) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev_y, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(down = "#FFD6CC", up = "#CFE8FF")) +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = "HOX — direction (up/down), significant only",
       x = "Paralog group (PG)", y = "Cluster (A at top)", fill = "Call") +
  theme_white
save_plot(p3, "P03_HOX_direction_SIGONLY")

# ======================================================================
# PLOT 4 — HOX colinearity strip (log2FC vs PG), per cluster
# ======================================================================
p4 <- ggplot(dat2, aes(HOX_PG, log2FC_raw)) +
  geom_jitter(width=.15, height=0, alpha=.8, size=2) +
  geom_smooth(method="lm", se=FALSE, linewidth=0.6, color="black") +
  facet_grid(~HOX_cluster, switch = "x") +
  theme_white + labs(title="HOX colinearity: PG (1→13) vs log2FC (sig only)",
                     x="Paralog group (PG)", y="log2FC")
save_plot(p4, "P04_HOX_colinearity_strip", w=10, h=3.4)

# ======================================================================
# PLOT 5 — Paralog-group RADAR per cluster (polar bars of mean |log2FC|)
# ======================================================================
rad <- dat2 |>
  group_by(HOX_cluster, HOX_PG) |>
  summarise(val = mean(abs(log2FC_raw), na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")
p5 <- ggplot(rad, aes(HOX_PG, val, fill = HOX_cluster)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.9, color="white") +
  coord_polar() +
  facet_wrap(~HOX_cluster, nrow=1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:13) +
  theme_white + theme(legend.position="none") +
  labs(title="Paralog-group radar — mean |log2FC| (sig HOX)", x="PG", y="mean |log2FC|")
save_plot(p5, "P05_HOX_radar_by_cluster", w=10, h=3.2)

# ======================================================================
# PLOT 6 — Somite/caudal gene lollipops (clean Up/Down legend)
# ======================================================================
som <- de2 |>
  filter(gene %in% somite_set) |>
  mutate(
    direction = case_when(
      log2FC_raw > 0 ~ "Up",
      log2FC_raw < 0 ~ "Down",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    lbl = ifelse(sig, gene, NA)
  )

p6 <- ggplot(som, aes(reorder(gene, log2FC_raw), log2FC_raw, fill = direction)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey70") +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = reorder(gene, log2FC_raw), y = 0, yend = log2FC_raw),
               linewidth = 0.8, color = "grey60") +
  geom_point(size = 3, shape = 21, color = "white") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_white +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Direction",
    values = c("Up" = "#6aaed6", "Down" = "#f4a582"),
    drop = TRUE
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Somitogenesis/caudal set — lollipop of log2FC",
    x = "", y = "log2FC"
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = NA)))
save_plot(p6, "P06_somite_lollipop", w = 7, h = 7)

# ======================================================================
# PLOT 7 — HOX vs expression proxy scatter
# ======================================================================
if (!has_baseMean) {
  message("PLOT 7 skipped: expression proxy (baseMean) unavailable.")
} else {
  p7 <- ggplot(dat2, aes(expr_log2, log2FC_raw, color = factor(HOX_PG))) +
    geom_hline(yintercept=0, color="grey80") +
    geom_point(size=2, alpha=0.9) +
    theme_white + labs(title="HOX — log2(baseMean+1) vs log2FC (sig only)",
                       x="log2(baseMean+1)", y="log2FC", color="PG")
  save_plot(p7, "P07_HOX_expr_vs_log2FC", w=6.8, h=4)
}

# ======================================================================
# PLOT 8 — Mini-grids per cluster (sig-only log2FC), arranged 2×2
# ======================================================================
p8 <- ggplot(dat2, aes(HOX_PG, 1, fill = log2FC_raw)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:13) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL) +
  facet_wrap(~HOX_cluster, nrow = 2) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#CFE8FF", mid = "#FFFFFF", high = "#FFD6CC",
                       midpoint = 0, oob = squish) +
  theme_white +
  theme(strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 12)) +
  labs(title = "HOX mini-grids (sig, log2FC) by cluster",
       x = "Paralog group (PG)", y = "", fill = "log2FC")
save_plot(p8, "P08_HOX_minigrids", w = 8, h = 5)

# ======================================================================
# PLOT 9 — Significance outline on full HOX grid (show ALL HOX; outline sig)
# ======================================================================
full_hox <- de2 |> filter(is_HOX)
p9 <- ggplot(full_hox, aes(HOX_PG, HOX_cluster, fill = log2FC_raw)) +
  geom_tile(color="white", linewidth=0.6) +
  geom_tile(data = subset(full_hox, sig), fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:13) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev_y, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low="#CFE8FF", mid="#FFFFFF", high="#FFD6CC",
                       midpoint=0, oob = squish) +
  coord_equal() + theme_white +
  labs(title="HOX — all tiles colored by log2FC with significant outlines",
       x="Paralog group (PG)", y="Cluster (A at top)", fill="log2FC")
save_plot(p9, "P09_HOX_all_with_sig_outlines")

# ======================================================================
# PLOT 10 — Enrichment barcode (simple GSEA-like) for curated sets
# ======================================================================
make_barcode <- function(df, geneset, title){
  if (!"stat" %in% names(df)) return(NULL)
  rr <- df |> mutate(rank = rank(-.data$stat, ties.method="average"))  # high stat → left
  rr$in_set <- rr$gene %in% geneset
  rr <- rr |> arrange(rank)
  rr$cum <- cumsum(ifelse(rr$in_set, 1, 0))
  p <- ggplot(rr, aes(x=rank)) +
    geom_rug(data = subset(rr, in_set), sides="b", color="black", alpha=0.7) +
    geom_line(aes(y = cum / sum(in_set)), color="steelblue", linewidth=0.8) +
    theme_white + labs(title=title, x="Rank by -stat (left = higher stat)", y="Running enrichment")
  p
}
p10 <- make_barcode(de2, somite_set, "Somite/caudal enrichment barcode (ranked by stat)")
if (is.null(p10)) {
  message("PLOT 10 skipped: DE table lacks 'stat' column for ranking.")
} else {
  save_plot(p10, "P10_enrichment_barcode", w=8, h=3)
}

# ======================================================================
# PLOT 11 — HOX ↔ somite correlation matrix (OPTIONAL, needs expr_file)
# ======================================================================
if (!is.null(expr_file)) {
  expr <- tryCatch(guess_reader(expr_file), error=function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(expr)) {
    names(expr)[1] <- "gene"; expr$gene <- toupper(as.character(expr$gene))
    mat <- expr |> mutate(across(-gene, ~suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.))))
    hox_rows   <- mat$gene[grepl("^HOX[ABCD][0-9]{1,2}$", mat$gene)]
    som_rows   <- intersect(somite_set, mat$gene)
    if (length(hox_rows)>0 && length(som_rows)>0) {
      mm <- as.matrix(mat[,-1]); rownames(mm) <- mat$gene
      mm <- log2(pmax(mm,0) + 1)
      H  <- t(mm[hox_rows, , drop=FALSE])
      S  <- t(mm[som_rows, , drop=FALSE])
      cor_mat <- cor(H, S, use="pairwise.complete.obs", method="spearman")
      cm <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_mat))
      names(cm) <- c("HOX","Somite","rho")
      cm$HOX_cluster <- factor(sapply(as.character(cm$HOX), function(g) hox_parse(g)[1]), levels=c("A","B","C","D"))
      cm$HOX_PG      <- as.integer(sapply(as.character(cm$HOX), function(g) hox_parse(g)[2]))
      p11 <- ggplot(cm, aes(Somite, paste0(HOX_cluster,"-",HOX_PG), fill=rho)) +
        geom_tile(color="white") +
        scale_fill_gradient2(low="#b2df8a", mid="white", high="#fb9a99", midpoint=0, limits=c(-1,1)) +
        theme_white + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=60, hjust=1)) +
        labs(title="HOX ↔ somite gene correlation (Spearman)", x="Somite genes", y="HOX (Cluster-PG)", fill="rho")
      save_plot(p11, "P11_HOX_somite_correlation", w=10, h=6)
    } else message("PLOT 11 skipped: HOX and/or somite genes not found in expression file.")
  } else message("PLOT 11 skipped: could not read expr_file.")
} else message("PLOT 11 skipped: expr_file not provided.")

# ======================================================================
# PLOT 12 — Genomic position vs effect (OPTIONAL, needs hox_coords_file)
# ======================================================================
if (!is.null(hox_coords_file)) {
  coords <- tryCatch(guess_reader(hox_coords_file), error=function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(coords) && all(c("gene","start") %in% tolower(names(coords)))) {
    names(coords) <- tolower(names(coords))
    coords$gene <- toupper(as.character(coords$gene))
    df <- de2 |> filter(is_HOX) |> left_join(coords |> dplyr::select(gene, start), by="gene")
    if (!all(is.na(df$start))) {
      p12 <- ggplot(df, aes(as.numeric(start), log2FC_raw, color = HOX_cluster)) +
        geom_hline(yintercept=0, color="grey80") +
        geom_point(size=2, alpha=.9) +
        theme_white + labs(title="HOX — genomic start vs log2FC", x="Genomic start", y="log2FC", color="Cluster")
      save_plot(p12, "P12_HOX_genomic_position_vs_log2FC", w=7, h=4)
    } else message("PLOT 12 skipped: 'start' was all NA after merge.")
  } else message("PLOT 12 skipped: coords file missing or lacks gene/start columns.")
} else message("PLOT 12 skipped: hox_coords_file not provided.")

# ======================================================================
# PLOT 13 — Volcano (somite-focused highlight + labels)
# ======================================================================
if (!("padj" %in% names(de2))) {
  message("PLOT 13 skipped: need padj for volcano.")
} else {
  volc <- de2 |>
    mutate(
      sigflag       = padj < padj_cut,
      somite_flag   = gene %in% somite_set,
      neglog10padj  = -log10(pmax(padj, 1e-300)),
      absLFC        = abs(log2FC_raw)
    ) |>
    arrange(padj, desc(absLFC)) |>
    mutate(
      somite_rank = ifelse(somite_flag, rank(padj, ties.method = "first"), NA_real_)
    )

  # Choose which somite genes to label
  label_df <- volc |>
    filter(somite_flag) |>
    filter(absLFC >= somite_label_min_absLFC) |>
    filter(is.infinite(somite_label_top_n) | somite_rank <= somite_label_top_n)

  if (isTRUE(somite_label_only_sig)) {
    label_df <- label_df |> filter(sigflag)
  }

  y_thr <- -log10(padj_cut)

  p13 <- ggplot(volc, aes(log2FC_raw, neglog10padj)) +
    # background points
    geom_point(aes(color = ifelse(somite_flag, "somite",
                           ifelse(sigflag, "sig","ns"))),
               alpha = 0.8, size = 1.6) +
    # somite "halo" under labels
    geom_point(data = subset(volc, somite_flag),
               shape = 21, size = 2.6, stroke = 0.6, fill = NA, color = "black", alpha = 0.9) +
    # guides
    geom_hline(yintercept = y_thr, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey60") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-volc_lfc_thr, volc_lfc_thr), linetype = "dotted",
               linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey70") +
    # labels
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
      data = label_df,
      aes(label = gene),
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = Inf,
      min.segment.length = 0,
      segment.size = 0.3,
      box.padding = 0.25,
      point.padding = 0.25,
      seed = 123
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(somite = "#3B82F6", sig = "#F59E0B", ns = "grey75")) +
    theme_white +
    labs(
      title = "Volcano — somite/caudal genes highlighted (labeled)",
      x = "log2FC",
      y = "-log10(padj)",
      color = ""
    ) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3, alpha = 1)))

  save_plot(p13, "P13_volcano_somite_focus", w = 7.6, h = 4.8)
}

# ======================================================================
# PLOT 14 — PG distribution violins (by PG across clusters)
# ======================================================================
p14 <- ggplot(dat2, aes(factor(HOX_PG), log2FC_raw, fill = HOX_cluster)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, color="grey85") +
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, alpha=.8, color="white") +
  theme_white + labs(title="HOX — log2FC distribution by PG (sig only)",
                     x="Paralog group (PG)", y="log2FC", fill="Cluster")
save_plot(p14, "P14_PG_violin_by_cluster", w=9, h=4.5)

# ---------------------------
# Console summary
# ---------------------------
message("All done. Outputs in: ", normalizePath(out_dir))

```
